THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKER, LON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 81 NINTH STREET #605, S.F., STAYED UNTIL SEP-16-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WVS BACK RENT, DAMAGES & ATTY FEES. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. PLTF SHALL RETAIN ALL MONIES HELD BY IT. PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMENT & DISM W/PREJUDICE UPON DEFT'S COMPLIANCE.
